arms.description: A battle-hardened master of weapons, using mobility and overpowering attacks to strike their opponents down. Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

left.name: Colossus
left.description: A veteran of countless battles who can shrug off attacks that would fell others while using their expertise to deliver their most powerful strikes and destroy their enemies.

right.name: Slayer
right.description: A vicious Warrior who sets their sights on a target and pursues it relentlessly, overwhelming their foes with an onslaught of steel and might.

nodes.name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
nodes.description: While wielding two-handed weapons your damage is increased by 3% and damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by 2%.

nodes.name: Impending Victory
nodes.description:
Instantly attack the target, causing 5900 damage and healing you for 30% of your maximum health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Impending Victory and makes it cost no Rage.

nodes.name: Battle Stance
nodes.description:
A balanced combat state that increases the critical strike chance of your abilities by 3% and reduces the duration of movement impairing effects by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

nodes.name: War Machine
nodes.description:
Your auto-attacks generate 10% more Rage.

Killing an enemy instantly generates 5 Rage and increases your movement speed by 30% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Rallying Cry
nodes.description:
Lets loose a rallying cry, granting all party or raid members within 40 yards 10% temporary and maximum health for 10 seconds.

Health granted increased by 50% when not in a raid.

nodes.name: Second Wind
nodes.description:
Restores 6% health every 1 second when you have not taken damage for 5 seconds.

Restores 2% health every 1 second while you are below 35% health. The amount restored increases the closer you are to death.

nodes.name: Storm Bolt
nodes.description: Hurls your weapon at an enemy, causing 2849 Physical damage and stunning for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Thunder Clap
nodes.description:
Blasts all enemies within 8 yards for 23567 Physical damage and reduces their movement speed by 20% for 10 seconds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

If you know Rend, inflicts Rend on all targets.

nodes.name: Fast Footwork
nodes.description: Movement speed increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Heroic Leap
nodes.description: Leap through the air toward a target location, slamming down with destructive force to deal 2350 Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

nodes.name: Barbaric Training
nodes.description: Slam, Whirlwind, and Cleave deal 10% more damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

choices.name: Berserker Shout
choices.description:
Go berserk, removing and granting immunity to Fear, Sap, and Incapacitate effects for 6 seconds.

Also remove fear effects from group members within 12 yds.

choices.name: Fearless
choices.description: Cooldown of Berserker Rage is reduced by 50% and Berseker Rage removes all movement speed-impairing effects.

choices.name: Wrecking Throw
choices.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy, causing 60000 Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

choices.name: Shattering Throw
choices.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy,  removing any magical immunities and causing 60000 Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

nodes.name: Frothing Berserker
nodes.description: Mortal Strike and Cleave have a 20% chance to immediately refund 10% of the Rage spent.

nodes.name: Pain and Gain
nodes.description:
When you take any damage, heal for 2% of your maximum health.

This can only occur once every 10 sec.

nodes.name: Bounding Stride
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by 15 seconds and Heroic Leap also increases your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Wild Strikes
nodes.description: Haste increased by 1% and your auto-attack critical strikes increase your auto-attack speed by 10% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Armored to the Teeth
nodes.description: Gain Strength equal to 5% of your Armor.

nodes.name: Reinforced Plates
nodes.description: Stamina increased by 5% and Armor increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Leeching Strikes
nodes.description: Leech increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Rumbling Earth
nodes.description: Shockwave's range increased by 6 yards and when it strikes at least 3 targets its cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Shockwave
nodes.description: Sends a wave of force in a frontal cone, causing 2000 damage and stunning all enemies within 10 yards for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Rage
nodes.description: Maximum Rage increased by 30.

nodes.name: Champion's Spear
nodes.description:
Throw a spear at the target location, chaining all enemies in the area to the spear's location and dealing 23925 Physical damage instantly and an additional 32624 Physical damage over 6 seconds.

While the spear is active, activating this ability will cause you to leap to the spear, dealing 4700 Physical damage to all targets.

All damage dealt reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 10 Rage.

nodes.name: Cruel Strikes
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 1% and critical strike damage of Execute increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Double Time
nodes.description: Charge gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Spell Reflection
nodes.description: Raise your weapon, reflecting the first spell cast on you and reducing magic damage you take by 20% for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Defensive Stance
nodes.description:
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15% and all damage you deal by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

nodes.name: Honed Reflexes
nodes.description:
Cooldown of Die By the Sword, Intervene, Interpose, Spell Reflection, Storm Bolt, and Pummel reduced by 10%.

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by 5% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Crackling Thunder
nodes.description: Thunder Clap's radius is increased by 50% and it reduces affected target's movement speed by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Stance Mastery
nodes.description:
Your stances have additional effects.

Battle Stance
Increases the critical strike damage of your abilities by 3%.

Defensive Stance
When an attack deals 20% or more of your maximum health in damage, that damage is reduced by 15%.

nodes.name: Anger Management
nodes.description: Every 20 Rage you spend on attacks reduces the remaining cooldown on Avatar and Colossus Smash by 1 second.

nodes.name: Battlefield Commander
nodes.description:
Your Shout abilities have additional effects.

Battle Shout:
Grants you an additional 3% attack power.

Rallying Cry:
Grants an additional 2% health and duration increased by 3 seconds.

Piercing Howl:
Radius increased by 100%

Berserker Shout:
Radius increased by 100%.

Intimidating Shout:
Cooldown reduced by 15 seconds.

choices.name: Intervene
choices.description: Run at high speed toward an ally, intercepting all melee and ranged attacks against them for 6 seconds while they remain within 10 yds.

choices.name: Interpose
choices.description: Run at high speed toward a target location near your allies, taking 30% of all damage dealt to allies within 3 yards for 8 seconds or until you take at least 120000 damage from this effect.

nodes.name: Resonant Voice
nodes.description: The effects of your shouts last 20% longer.

nodes.name: Crushing Force
nodes.description: Mortal Strike deals an additional 5% damage and deals 5% increased critical strike damage.

choices.name: Intimidating Shout
choices.description:
Causes the targeted enemy to cower in fear while all enemies within 8 yards flee from you and their movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 seconds.
Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Piercing Howl
choices.description:
Snares all enemies within 12 yards, reducing their movement speed by 70% for 8 seconds.

Spurs all allies within 6 yards, increasing their movement speed by 30% for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Rend
nodes.description: Lash out with your weapon, striking all targets within 10 yds for 25924 Physical damage instantly and wounding them for an additional 19046 Bleed damage over 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Javelineer
nodes.description:
Range of your thrown abilities is increased by 5 yards.

Damage dealt by Champion's Spear, Shattering Throw, and Wrecking Throw increased by 20%.

Shattering Throw and Wrecking Throw silence non-players for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Field Dressing
nodes.description: Healing received increased by 3% and all self-healing increased by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Fervor of Battle
nodes.description: If Cleave or Whirlwind hits 3 or more targets you also Slam your primary target. This Slam deals 50% additional damage.

nodes.name: Die by the Sword
nodes.description: Increases your parry chance by 100% and reduces all damage you take by 30% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Mortal Strike
nodes.description: A vicious strike that deals 52012 Physical damage and reduces the effectiveness of healing on the target by 50% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Overpower
nodes.description: Overpower the enemy, dealing 32134 Physical damage. Cannot be blocked, dodged, or parried.

nodes.name: Improved Execute
nodes.description: Execute no longer has a cooldown and if your foe survives, 10% of the Rage spent is refunded.

nodes.name: Sudden Death
nodes.description: Your attacks have a chance to make your next Execute cost no Rage, be usable on any target regardless of their health, and deal damage as if you spent 40 Rage.

choices.name: Fueled by Violence
choices.description: You are healed for 85% of the Bleed damage dealt by Rend and Deep Wounds.

choices.name: Ignore Pain
choices.description: Fight through the pain, ignoring 50% of damage taken for 12 seconds or until 176000 damage has been prevented.

nodes.name: Bloodsurge
nodes.description: Damage from Rend has a chance to generate 5 Rage.

nodes.name: Improved Overpower
nodes.description: Overpower has 2 charges and deals 15% more damage.

nodes.name: Tactician
nodes.description:
You have a 30% chance to gain a charge of Overpower when you use an attack that has a Rage cost.
This effect applies even if that ability's Rage cost has been reduced to zero.

nodes.name: Bloodborne
nodes.description: Your Bleed effects deal 5% increased damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

nodes.name: Dreadnaught
nodes.description: Overpower causes a seismic wave, dealing 7000 damage to all enemies in a 10 yd line. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Colossus Smash
nodes.description: Smash the ground and shatter the armor of all enemies within 1 yds, dealing 30626 Physical damage and increasing damage you deal to them by 30% for 10 seconds. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Massacre
nodes.description: Execute is usable on targets below 35% health.

nodes.name: Impale
nodes.description: Critical strike damage of your abilities is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Cleave
nodes.description: Strikes all enemies in front of you for 25868 Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Bloodletting
nodes.description:
Rend and Deep Wounds' Bleed effects last 33% longer and have a 5% increased critical strike chance.

If you know Rend, Mortal Strike inflicts Rend on targets below 35% health.

nodes.name: Fatality
nodes.description: Mortal Strike has a 50% chance to apply a Fatal Mark to your target, stacking up to 5 times. Your next Execute on a target with a Fatal Mark causes the Fatal Mark to deal 27599 additional Physical damage per stack.

choices.name: Bladestorm
choices.description:
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for 190145 Physical damage over 6 seconds. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

choices.name: Ravager
choices.description:
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting 71710 Physical damage to all enemies over 12 seconds. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Cleave and Whirlwind deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active

nodes.name: Critical Thinking
nodes.description: Execute critical strike chance increased by 5% and Execute immediately refunds an additional 10% of the Rage spent.

nodes.name: Executioner's Precision
nodes.description: Execute increases the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 35%, stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Sharpened Blades
nodes.description: Mortal Strike, Cleave, and Execute damage increased by 5% and critical strike damage increased by 5%.

choices.name: Improved Sweeping Strikes
choices.description: Sweeping Strikes affects 6 additional damaging single-target abilities.

choices.name: Powerful Momentum
choices.description: Secondary targets take an additional 25% damage from Sweeping Strikes.

nodes.name: Overpowering Finish
nodes.description: Overpower deals 15% additional damage to targets below 35% health.

nodes.name: Battlelord
nodes.description: Overpower has a 35% chance to reset the cooldown of Mortal Strike and reduce the cost of your next Mortal Strike by 33%.

nodes.name: Master Tactician
nodes.description: Tactician has a 5% increased chance to trigger.

nodes.name: Martial Prowess
nodes.description: Overpower and Slam increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 5%, stacking up to 3 times.

choices.name: Brute Force
choices.description: Slam has a 10% increased chance to trigger Tactician.

choices.name: Efficiency
choices.description: Slam's Rage cost is reduced by 25%.

nodes.name: Collateral Damage
nodes.description: When an ability used during Sweeping Strikes damages a second target, your next Cleave or Whirlwind deals 25% increased damage, stacking up to 3 times.

choices.name: Tactical Edge
choices.description: Colossus Smash causes your next 2 Mortal Strikes to have a 100% chance to trigger Tactician.

choices.name: Crushing Combo
choices.description: Colossus Smash causes your next 2 Cleaves within 20 seconds to trigger no cooldown.

nodes.name: Deep Wounds
nodes.description:
Execute inflicts Deep Wounds on the target.

Deep Wounds
Causes the target to suffer 14547 Bleed damage over 6 seconds. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Deep Wounds.

nodes.name: Mortal Wounds
nodes.description:
Mortal Strike and Slam critical strikes inflict Deep Wounds at 100% effectiveness.

Deep Wounds
Causes the target to suffer 14547 Bleed damage over 6 seconds. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Deep Wounds.

choices.name: Just Warming Up
choices.description: Colossus Smash generates 15 Rage.

choices.name: Broad Strokes
choices.description: Colossus Smash grants you Sweeping Strikes.

nodes.name: Strength of Arms
nodes.description:
Overpower and Slam damage increased by 5% and critical strike damage increased by 5%.
Critical strike chance of Slam and Overpower increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Mass Execution
nodes.description: Cleave and Whirlwind deal 20% additional damage to targets below 35% health.

nodes.name: Avatar
nodes.description: Transform into a colossus, increasing all damage you deal by 20% and reducing damage you take from area of effect attacks by 5% for 20 seconds.

ranks.description:
Your single target melee abilities have a chance to upgrade Slam to Heroic Strike.
All modifiers and talents that affect Slam also affect Heroic Strike.

Powerfully strike an opponent, causing 60000 Physical damage and gaining a stack of Master of Warfare, allowing your attacks to penetrate 3% armor for 30 seconds. Multiple applications of this effect may overlap.
Each stack of Master of Warfare increases Mortal Strike, Cleave, and Overpower damage by 2.5% and critical strike damage by 2.5%.
Heroic Strike increases the damage you deal to enemies affected by your next Colossus Smash by an additional 3%. Stacks up to 5 times.

choices.name: Boneshaker
choices.description: Shockwave's stun duration is increased by 1 second and reduces the movement speed of affected enemies by 40% for 3 seconds after the stun ends.

choices.name: Earthquaker
choices.description: Shockwave also knocks enemies into the air and its cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Dominance of the Colossus
nodes.description:
Colossal Might stacks up to 10 times. If you would gain a stack of Colossal Might and are at max stacks, the cooldown of Demolish is reduced by 5 seconds.

Enemies affected by Demolish take up to 10% more damage from you and deal up to 10% less damage to you for 10 seconds based on the number of stacks of Colossal Might consumed by Demolish.

nodes.name: Precise Might
nodes.description: Mortal Strike critical strikes grant an additional stack of Colossal Might.

nodes.name: Practiced Strikes
nodes.description:
Mortal Strike and Slam damage increased by 15%.

Cleave and Whirlwind damage increased by 15%.

choices.name: One Against Many
choices.description: Shockwave, Cleave, and Whirlwind deal 5% more damage per target affected up to 5.

choices.name: Arterial Bleed
choices.description: Colossal Might increases the damage of your Rend and Deep Wounds by 3% per stack.

nodes.name: Mountain of Muscle and Scars
nodes.description:
You deal 5% more damage and take 5% less damage.

Size increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Tide of Battle
nodes.description: Colossal Might increases the damage of your Overpower by 3% per stack.

nodes.name: Martial Expert
nodes.description: Critical strike damage of your abilities is increased by 10% and the amount of damage blocked by your critical blocks is increased by 20%.

choices.name: No Stranger to Pain
choices.description: Damage prevented by each use of Ignore Pain is increased by 20%.

choices.name: Veteran Vitality
choices.description:
When your health is brought below 35%, you gain a Second Wind, healing you for 12% of your max health over 2 seconds.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 60 sec.

nodes.name: Demolish
nodes.description:
Unleash a series of precise and powerful strikes against your target, dealing 229527 damage to it, and 123236 damage to enemies within 10 of it. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

While channeling Demolish, you take 10% less damage and are immune to stuns, knockbacks, and forced movement effects.

You can block, parry, dodge, and use certain defensive abilities while channeling Demolish.

nodes.name: Colossal Might
nodes.description:
Colossal Might increases damage dealt by your next Demolish by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

Mortal Strike grants a stack of Colossal Might and Cleave grants a stack of Colossal Might when it strikes 3 or more targets.

nodes.name: Celeritous Conclusion
nodes.description: Demolish's final strike grants 10% Haste for 10 seconds and increases the critical strike chance of your next Mortal Strike by 100%.

nodes.name: Cut to the Bone
nodes.description: Mortal Strike critical strikes increase your Rend and Deep Wounds damage by 15% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Decimator
nodes.description: Demolish's final strike applies Deep Wounds to all targets at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Show No Mercy
nodes.description: Executioner also increases your Execute critical strike chance and critical strike damage by 3% per stack.

choices.name: Culling Cyclone
choices.description: Each strike of Bladestorm deals an additional 20% damage evenly split across all targets.

choices.name: Brutal Finish
choices.description: Your next Mortal Strike after Bladestorm ends deals 50% additional damage.

choices.name: Fierce Followthrough
choices.description: Mortal Strike critical strikes increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 20%.

choices.name: Opportunist
choices.description: When Overpower has its cooldown reset by Tactician, your next Overpower deals 10% additional damage and 10% additional critical damage. Stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Imminent Demise
nodes.description:
Every 3 Slayer's Strikes you gain Sudden Death.

Using Sudden Death accelerates your next Bladestorm, striking 1 additional time (max 3). Bladestorm's total duration is unchanged.

When Sudden Death strikes multiple targets via Sweeping Strikes, you have a 100% chance to trigger Reap the Storm.

choices.name: Relentless Pursuit
choices.description:
Charge increases your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

Charge removes all movement impairing effects, this effect cannot occur more than once every 30 seconds.

choices.name: Vicious Agility
choices.description: Heroic Leap reduces the cooldown of Charge by 5 second and Charge reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Slayer's Malice
nodes.description: Overpower and Execute damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Reap the Storm
nodes.description: When Cleave hits 3 or more targets you have a 20% chance to unleash a flurry of steel, striking all nearby enemies for 59377 Physical damage and applying Overwhelmed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Blades
nodes.description: Each strike of Bladestorm applies Overwhelmed to all enemies affected, increasing damage you deal to them by 1% for 20 seconds, max 5 stacks.

nodes.name: Death Drive
nodes.description: You heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sudden Death.

nodes.name: Slayer's Dominance
nodes.description: Your attacks against your primary target have a 15% chance to overwhelm their defenses and trigger a Slayer's Strike, dealing 60030 Physical damage and granting you a stack of Executioner, increasing your Execute damage by 3% for 12 seconds. Multiple stacks of Executioner may overlap.

nodes.name: Unrelenting Onslaught
nodes.description:
Using Sudden Death causes you to both reduce the cooldown of Bladestorm by 5 second and apply 1 stack of Overwhelmed to your primary target per stack of Executioner you have.

You can use Pummel and Storm Bolt while Bladestorming.

Bladestorm damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Unhinged
nodes.description: Every 2 strikes of Bladestorm, you automatically cast a Mortal Strike at your target or random nearby enemy, dealing 100% of normal damage.

nodes.name: Deadly Focus
nodes.description: Executioner's duration is increased by 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Violent Euphoria
nodes.description: Bladestorm puts you into a battle trance, granting you 15% haste for 8 seconds after you stop Bladestorming.

fury.description: A furious dual-wielding berserker unleashing a flurry of attacks to carve their opponents to pieces. Preferred Weapons: Dual Two-Handed Axes, Maces, Swords

left.name: Mountain Thane
left.description: Mountain Thanes are fierce fighters that live to challenge themselves against worthy opponents. Drawing strength from the earth and power from the storm, they strike with blows that hit like a thunder clap to overwhelm their enemies.

right.name: Slayer
right.description: A vicious Warrior who sets their sights on a target and pursues it relentlessly, overwhelming their foes with an onslaught of steel and might.

nodes.description:
An aggressive combat state that increases the damage of your auto-attacks by 15% and reduces the duration of Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects on you by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

nodes.description:
Range of your thrown abilities is increased by 5 yards.

Damage dealt by Champion's Spear, Shattering Throw, and Wrecking Throw increased by 20%.

Shattering Throw and Wrecking Throw silence non-players for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Field Dressing
nodes.description: Healing received increased by 3% and all self-healing increased by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Wrath and Fury
nodes.description: Raging Blow deals 15% increased damage and while Enraged, Raging Blow has a 10% increased chance to instantly reset its own cooldown.

nodes.name: Reckless Abandon
nodes.description:
Activating Recklessness generates 50 Rage and while Recklessness is active, Raging Blow and Bloodthirst are upgraded to Crushing Blow and Bloodbath.

Crushing Blow
Deals increased damage and deals 503% additional critical strike damage.

Bloodbath
Deals increased damage and wounds the target to suffer 6000 Bleed damage over 6 seconds. Using Bloodbath on a target affected by Bloodbath extends the bleed by 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Improved Raging Blow
nodes.description: Raging Blow has 2 charges and has a 25% chance to instantly reset its own cooldown.

nodes.name: Rampaging Ruin
nodes.description: While Improved Whirlwind is active Rampage instead strikes all targets in front of you for 49639 Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Bloodthirst
nodes.description:
Assault the target in a bloodthirsty craze, dealing 42420 Physical damage and restoring 3% of your health.

Generates 8 Rage and has a 30% chance to Enrage you.

nodes.name: Warpaint
nodes.description: You take 10% reduced damage while Enrage is active.

nodes.name: Enraged Regeneration
nodes.description: Reduces damage taken by 30% and Bloodthirst restores an additional 20% health for 8 seconds. Usable while stunned or incapacitated.

nodes.name: Raging Blow
nodes.description:
A mighty blow with both weapons that deals a total of 34500 Physical damage.

Generates 12 Rage.

nodes.name: Spite
nodes.description: Bloodthirst and Raging Blow damage increased by 2.5% and critical strike damage increased by 2.5%.

choices.name: Frenzied Enrage
choices.description: Enrage increases your haste by 15% and your movement speed by 10%.

choices.name: Powerful Enrage
choices.description: Enrage increases your mastery by 15% and your Leech by 3%.

nodes.name: Fresh Meat
nodes.description: Bloodthirst always Enrages you the first time you strike a target and it has a 15% increased chance to trigger Enrage.

nodes.name: Bloodborne
nodes.description: Bloodthirst causes your Bleeds to deal 20% additional damage for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Cold Steel, Hot Blood
nodes.description: Bloodthirst critical strikes generate 4 additional Rage and inflict a Gushing Wound that deals 12150 Bleed damage over 6 seconds and heals you for the damage dealt.

nodes.name: Focus in Chaos
nodes.description: While Enraged, your auto-attacks can no longer miss.

nodes.name: Bloodcraze
nodes.description: Raging Blow increases the damage of your next Bloodthirst by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Frenzy
nodes.description: Rampage increases your haste by 2% for 12 seconds. Multiple instances of this effect may overlap.

nodes.name: Hack and Slash
nodes.description: Rampage has a 100% chance to refund a charge of Raging Blow.

nodes.name: Rampage
nodes.description:
Unleash a series of 4 brutal strikes for a total of 74458 Physical damage.

Enrages you.

nodes.name: Massacre
nodes.description: Execute is usable on targets below 35% health and its cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Recklessness
nodes.description: Go berserk, increasing all Rage generation by 50% and granting your abilities 20% increased critical strike chance for 12 seconds.

choices.name: Avatar
choices.description: Transform into a colossus, increasing all damage you deal by 20% and increasing your movement speed by 5% for 20 seconds.

choices.name: Bladestorm
choices.description:
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for 285217 Physical damage over 6 seconds. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

Generates 5 Rage on each strike.

nodes.name: Deft Experience
nodes.description: Bloodthirst's critical strike chance increased by 5% and if you are Enraged, Bloodthirst extends your Enrage by 0.5 second. This extension is doubled if Bloodthirst critically strikes your primary target.

nodes.name: Critical Thinking
nodes.description: Raging Blow's critical strike chance increased by 5% and critical strike damage increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Improved Whirlwind
nodes.description:
Whirlwind causes your next 4 single-target attacks to strike up to 4 additional targets for 65% damage.

Whirlwind generates 3 Rage plus an additional 1 per target hit. Maximum 8 Rage.

If you know Rend, Whirlwind inflicts Rend on all targets.

nodes.name: Cruelty
nodes.description: While Enraged, Bloodthirst and Raging Blow deal 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Improved Execute
nodes.description: Execute no longer costs Rage and now generates 20 Rage.

nodes.name: Sudden Death
nodes.description: Your attacks have a chance to make your next Execute be usable on any target regardless of their health.

nodes.name: Ragedrinker
nodes.description: Bloodthirst critical strikes restore 3% additional health and increase the damage of Raging Blow by 10% for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Vicious Contempt
nodes.description: Bloodthirst deals 25% increased damage to enemies who are below 35% health.

nodes.name: Surge of Adrenaline
nodes.description: When Raging Blow resets its own cooldown, your auto-attack damage and speed is increased by 30% for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Kill or Be Killed
nodes.description:
When you would sustain fatal damage, you instead fly into an unstoppable rage, becoming unkillable and immune to movement-impairing effects for 8 seconds as you seek revenge on your would-be killer.

If you kill your killer in that time, you emerge from your blind rage triumphant, with at least 20% of your max health intact. If you are not victorious, you die.

This effect can only occur once every 5 minutes and if your killer is alive when you sustain fatal damage.

nodes.name: Deep Wounds
nodes.description:
Execute inflicts Deep Wounds on the target.

Deep Wounds
Causes the target to suffer 14547 Bleed damage over 6 seconds. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Deep Wounds.

nodes.name: Meat Cleaver
nodes.description: Whirlwind deals 50% additional damage when it hits 3 or more targets.

nodes.name: Executioner's Wrath
nodes.description: Execute generates 5 additional Rage and increases the damage of Rampage by 10% for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Scent of Blood
nodes.description: Rampage increases the damage of your next Bloodthirst by 10%, stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Odyn's Fury
nodes.description:
Unleashes your power, dealing 73039 Physical damage and an additional 52000 Bleed damage over 4 seconds to all enemies within 12 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enrages you and generates 20 Rage.

nodes.name: Invigorating Fury
nodes.description: Enraged Regeneration lasts 3 seconds longer and instantly heals for 10% of your maximum health.

ranks.description: Rampage damage increased by 10% and Rampage makes you go Berserk, increasing your Strength by 3% for 8 seconds. Multiple applications of Berserk may overlap.
Rampage's Rage cost is reduced by 15 and damage is increased by a further 5% during Recklessness.
Recklessness grants 3 stacks of Berserk and duration of Recklessness increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Thunder Blast
nodes.description:
Shield Slam and Bloodthirst have a 35% chance to grant you Thunder Blast, stacking up to 2 charges.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals 15213 Stormstrike damage and generates 2 Rage.

choices.name: Gathering Clouds
choices.description: Your attacks trigger Lightning Strikes 30% more often.

choices.name: Thorim's Might
choices.description:
Lightning Strikes generate 3 Rage.

Raging Blow and Execute damage increased by 25%.

choices.name: Flashing Skies
choices.description: Thunder Blast calls down a Lightning Strike on an enemy it hits.

choices.name: Snap Induction
choices.description: Activating Recklessness grants a charge of Thunder Blast.

choices.name: Keep Your Feet on the Ground
choices.description:
Physical damage taken reduced by 2%.

Thunder Blast reduces damage you take by 8% for 5 seconds.

choices.name: Steadfast as the Peaks
choices.description:
Stamina increased by 5%.

Victory Rush increases your maximum health by 10% for 5 seconds. When this health increase expires, you heal for any amount of the original Victory Rush that healed you in excess of your full health.

nodes.name: Ground Current
nodes.description: Lightning Strikes also deal 2980 Nature damage to enemies near their target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Lightning Strikes
nodes.description:
Damaging enemies with Thunder Clap, Raging Blow, or Execute has a 25% chance to also strike one with a lightning bolt, dealing 15510 Nature damage.

Lightning Strikes occur 30% more often during Avatar.

nodes.name: Avatar of the Storm
nodes.description:
Casting Avatar grants you 2 charges of Thunder Blast and resets the cooldown of Thunder Clap.

While Avatar is not active, Lightning Strikes have a 10% chance to grant you Avatar for 4 secs.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals Stormstrike damage.

nodes.name: Burst of Power
nodes.description: Lightning Strikes have a 15% chance to make your next 2 Bloodthirsts have no cooldown, deal 35% increased damage, and generate 2 additional Rage.

nodes.name: Strength of the Mountain
nodes.description:
Shield Slam damage increased by 15%.

Bloodthirst and Rampage damage increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Crashing Thunder
nodes.description:
Stormstrike or Nature damage your abilities deal is increased by 5%. Stormstrike damage ignores Armor.

Thunder Clap damage increased by 30%, no longer costs Rage, and now generates 8 Rage.

Improved Whirlwind, Meat Cleaver, and Barbaric Training affect Thunder Clap in addition to Whirlwind.

choices.name: Storm Bolts
choices.description: Storm Bolt also hits 2 additional nearby targets, stunning them for 2 sec, but its cooldown is increased by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Storm Shield
choices.description: Intervening a target grants them a shield for 5 seconds that absorbs magic damage equal to 3 times your Armor.

nodes.name: Capacitance
nodes.description: During Avatar, Thunder Blast extends Avatar's duration by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Conductivity
nodes.description: Lightning Strike damage increased by 10% and critical strike damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Storm Surge
nodes.description: Avatar increases the damage of Thunder Clap by 50% and reduces its cooldown by 200%.

nodes.name: Show No Mercy
nodes.description: Executioner also increases your Execute critical strike chance and critical strike damage by 3% per stack.

choices.name: Culling Cyclone
choices.description: Each strike of Bladestorm deals an additional 20% damage evenly split across all targets.

choices.name: Brutal Finish
choices.description: Your next Rampage after Bladestorm ends deals 50% additional damage.

choices.name: Fierce Followthrough
choices.description: Bloodthirst critical strikes increase the damage of your next Bloodthirst by 20%.

choices.name: Opportunist
choices.description: When Raging Blow resets its own cooldown, your next Raging Blow deals 10% additional damage and 10% additional critical damage. Stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Imminent Demise
nodes.description:
Every 3 Slayer's Strikes you gain Sudden Death.

Using Sudden Death accelerates your next Bladestorm, striking 1 additional time (max 3). Bladestorm's total duration is unchanged.

When Sudden Death strikes multiple targets via Improved Whirlwind, you have a 100% chance to trigger Reap the Storm.

choices.name: Relentless Pursuit
choices.description:
Charge increases your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

Charge removes all movement impairing effects, this effect cannot occur more than once every 30 seconds.

choices.name: Vicious Agility
choices.description: Heroic Leap reduces the cooldown of Charge by 5 second and Charge reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Slayer's Malice
nodes.description: Raging Blow and Execute damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Reap the Storm
nodes.description: When Rampage hits 3 or more targets via Improved Whirlwind you have a 20% chance to unleash a flurry of steel, striking all nearby enemies for 59377 Physical damage and applying Overwhelmed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Blades
nodes.description: Each strike of Bladestorm applies Overwhelmed to all enemies affected, increasing damage you deal to them by 1% for 20 seconds, max 5 stacks.

nodes.name: Death Drive
nodes.description: You heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sudden Death.

nodes.name: Slayer's Dominance
nodes.description: Your attacks against your primary target have a 15% chance to overwhelm their defenses and trigger a Slayer's Strike, dealing 60030 Physical damage and granting you a stack of Executioner, increasing your Execute damage by 3% for 12 seconds. Multiple stacks of Executioner may overlap.

nodes.name: Unrelenting Onslaught
nodes.description:
Using Sudden Death causes you to both reduce the cooldown of Bladestorm by 5 second and apply 1 stack of Overwhelmed to your primary target per stack of Executioner you have.

You can use Pummel and Storm Bolt while Bladestorming.

Bladestorm damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Unhinged
nodes.description: Every 2 strikes of Bladestorm, you automatically cast a Bloodthirst at your target or random nearby enemy, dealing 100% of normal damage.

nodes.name: Deadly Focus
nodes.description: Executioner's duration is increased by 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Violent Euphoria
nodes.description: Bladestorm puts you into a battle trance, granting you 15% haste for 8 seconds after you stop Bladestorming.

protection.description: A stalwart protector who uses a shield to safeguard themselves and their allies. Preferred Weapon: Axe, Mace, Sword, and Shield

left.name: Colossus
left.description: A veteran of countless battles who can shrug off attacks that would fell others while using their expertise to deliver their most powerful strikes and destroy their enemies.

right.name: Mountain Thane
right.description: Mountain Thanes are fierce fighters that live to challenge themselves against worthy opponents. Drawing strength from the earth and power from the storm, they strike with blows that hit like a thunder clap to overwhelm their enemies.

nodes.name: Battle Stance
nodes.description:
A balanced combat state that increases the critical strike chance of your abilities by 3% and reduces the duration of movement impairing effects by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

nodes.name: One-Handed Weapon Specialization
nodes.description: While wielding one-handed weapons your damage is increased by 3% and Leech increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Impending Victory
nodes.description:
Instantly attack the target, causing 5900 damage and healing you for 30% of your maximum health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Impending Victory and makes it cost no Rage.

nodes.name: War Machine
nodes.description:
Your auto-attacks generate 50% more Rage.

Killing an enemy instantly generates 5 Rage and increases your movement speed by 30% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Intervene
nodes.description: Run at high speed toward an ally, intercepting all melee and ranged attacks against them for 6 seconds while they remain within 10 yds.

nodes.name: Defensive Stance
nodes.description:
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15%.

Lasts until canceled.

nodes.name: Rallying Cry
nodes.description:
Lets loose a rallying cry, granting all party or raid members within 40 yards 10% temporary and maximum health for 10 seconds.

Health granted increased by 50% when not in a raid.

nodes.name: Second Wind
nodes.description:
Restores 6% health every 1 second when you have not taken damage for 5 seconds.

Restores 2% health every 1 second while you are below 35% health. The amount restored increases the closer you are to death.

nodes.name: Storm Bolt
nodes.description: Hurls your weapon at an enemy, causing 2849 Physical damage and stunning for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Thunder Clap
nodes.description:
Blasts all enemies within 8 yards for 23567 Physical damage and reduces their movement speed by 20% for 10 seconds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

If you know Rend, inflicts Rend on all targets.

Generates 0 Rage.

nodes.name: Fast Footwork
nodes.description: Movement speed increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Heroic Leap
nodes.description: Leap through the air toward a target location, slamming down with destructive force to deal 2350 Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards and resetting the remaining cooldown on Taunt.

nodes.name: Barbaric Training
nodes.description: Revenge deals 10% more damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

choices.name: Berserker Shout
choices.description:
Go berserk, removing and granting immunity to Fear, Sap, and Incapacitate effects for 6 seconds.

Also remove fear effects from group members within 12 yds.

choices.name: Fearless
choices.description: Cooldown of Berserker Rage is reduced by 50% and Berseker Rage removes all movement speed-impairing effects.

choices.name: Wrecking Throw
choices.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy, causing 60000 Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

choices.name: Shattering Throw
choices.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy,  removing any magical immunities and causing 60000 Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

nodes.name: Frothing Berserker
nodes.description: Revenge has a 20% chance to immediately refund 50% of the Rage spent.

nodes.name: Pain and Gain
nodes.description:
When you take any damage, heal for 2% of your maximum health.

This can only occur once every 10 sec.

nodes.name: Bounding Stride
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by 15 seconds and Heroic Leap also increases your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Wild Strikes
nodes.description: Haste increased by 1% and your auto-attack critical strikes increase your auto-attack speed by 10% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Armored to the Teeth
nodes.description: Gain Strength equal to 2% of your Armor.

nodes.name: Reinforced Plates
nodes.description: Stamina increased by 5% and Armor increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Leeching Strikes
nodes.description: Leech increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Rumbling Earth
nodes.description: Shockwave's range increased by 6 yards and when it strikes at least 3 targets its cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Shockwave
nodes.description: Sends a wave of force in a frontal cone, causing 2000 damage and stunning all enemies within 10 yards for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Rage
nodes.description: Maximum Rage increased by 30.

nodes.name: Champion's Spear
nodes.description:
Throw a spear at the target location, chaining all enemies in the area to the spear's location and dealing 23925 Physical damage instantly and an additional 32624 Physical damage over 6 seconds.

While the spear is active, activating this ability will cause you to leap to the spear, dealing 4700 Physical damage to all targets.

All damage dealt reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 10 Rage.

nodes.name: Cruel Strikes
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 1% and critical strike damage of Execute increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Double Time
nodes.description: Charge gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Spell Reflection
nodes.description: Raise your shield, reflecting the first spell cast on you and reducing magic damage you take by 20% for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Honed Reflexes
nodes.description:
Cooldown of Shield Wall, Intervene, Spell Reflection, Storm Bolt, and Pummel reduced by 10%.

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by 5% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Crackling Thunder
nodes.description: Thunder Clap's radius is increased by 50% and it reduces affected target's movement speed by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Stance Mastery
nodes.description:
Your stances have additional effects.

Battle Stance
Increases the critical strike damage of your abilities by 3%.

Defensive Stance
When an attack deals 20% or more of your maximum health in damage, that damage is reduced by 15%.

nodes.name: Anger Management
nodes.description: Every 20 Rage you spend reduces the remaining cooldown on Avatar and Shield Wall by 1 second.

nodes.name: Battlefield Commander
nodes.description:
Your Shout abilities have additional effects.

Battle Shout:
Grants you an additional 3% attack power.

Rallying Cry:
Grants an additional 2% health and duration increased by 3 seconds.

Piercing Howl:
Radius increased by 100%

Berserker Shout:
Radius increased by 100%.

Intimidating Shout:
Cooldown reduced by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Resonant Voice
nodes.description: The effects of your shouts last 20% longer.

nodes.name: Crushing Force
nodes.description: Shield Slam deals an additional 5% damage and deals 5% increased critical strike damage.

choices.name: Intimidating Shout
choices.description:
Causes the targeted enemy to cower in fear while all enemies within 8 yards flee from you and their movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 seconds.
Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Piercing Howl
choices.description:
Snares all enemies within 12 yards, reducing their movement speed by 70% for 8 seconds.

Spurs all allies within 6 yards, increasing their movement speed by 30% for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Rend
nodes.description: Lash out with your weapon, striking all targets within 10 yds for 25924 Physical damage instantly and wounding them for an additional 19046 Bleed damage over 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Javelineer
nodes.description:
Range of your thrown abilities is increased by 5 yards.

Damage dealt by Champion's Spear, Shattering Throw, and Wrecking Throw increased by 20%.

Shattering Throw and Wrecking Throw silence non-players for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Field Dressing
nodes.description: Healing received increased by 3% and all self-healing increased by an additional 10%.

choices.name: Bloodborne
choices.description: Your Deep Wounds and Rend deal 25% increased damage.

choices.name: Sudden Death
choices.description: Your attacks have a chance to make your next Execute be usable on any target regardless of their health.

nodes.name: Violent Outburst
nodes.description: Every 250 rage you spend triggers a Violent Outburst, causing your next Shield Slam to deal 200% increased damage, generate 50% more Rage and grant Ignore Pain.

nodes.name: Ignore Pain
nodes.description:
Fight through the pain, ignoring 50% of damage taken until 131382 damage has been prevented.

Repeated uses of Ignore Pain accumulate, up to 180000 total damage prevented.

nodes.name: Devastating Focus
nodes.description:
You focus on the target struck by your Devastator, dealing 30% additional Revenge damage to them.

Only one target can have your focus at a time.

nodes.name: Devastator
nodes.description: Your auto-attacks deal an additional 13140 Physical damage and have a 25% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Shield Slam.

nodes.name: Revenge
nodes.description:
Swing in a wide arc, dealing 23472 Physical damage to all enemies in front of you. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Your successful dodges and parries have a chance to make your next Revenge cost no Rage.

nodes.name: Fight Through the Flames
nodes.description: Defensive Stance additionally reduces magic damage you take by 4%.

nodes.name: Bloodsurge
nodes.description: Damage from Rend has a chance to generate 5 Rage.

nodes.name: Instigate
nodes.description:
Devastate deals 20% increased damage and generates 2 Rage.

Devastator deals 10% increased damage and generates 2 Rage.

nodes.name: Shield Wall
nodes.description: Reduces all damage you take by 40% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Strategist
nodes.description: Devastate, Thunder Clap, Revenge, and Execute have a 25% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Shield Slam.

nodes.name: Brace For Impact
nodes.description: Using Shield Slam increases the damage of Shield Slam by 10% and the block value of your shield by 5% for 16 seconds. Stacking up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Demoralizing Shout
nodes.description: Demoralizes all enemies within 10 yards, reducing the damage they deal to you by 20% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Armor Specialization
nodes.description: Armor increased by 6%.

nodes.name: Thunderlord
nodes.description:
Increases the radius of Demoralizing Shout by 5 yards.

Each enemy hit by Thunder Clap reduces the remaining cooldown on Demoralizing Shout by 1.5 sec, up to 4.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Best Served Cold
nodes.description: Your dodges and parries make your Revenge cost no Rage 20% more frequently and increase the damage your free Revenges deal by 15%. Revenge increases the damage of your next Thunder Clap by 8%.

nodes.name: Deep Wounds
nodes.description:
Execute inflicts Deep Wounds on the target.

Deep Wounds
Causes the target to suffer 14547 Bleed damage over 6 seconds. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Deep Wounds.

nodes.name: Enduring Defenses
nodes.description: Shield Block lasts 1 second longer.

choices.name: Heavy Repercussions
choices.description: Shield Slam generates 2 more Rage and extends the duration of Shield Block by 1 second.

choices.name: Into the Fray
choices.description: You gain 2% Haste for each enemy or ally within 10 yards, up to 8% Haste.

nodes.name: Heavy Handed
nodes.description: Execute hits up to 2 additional targets for 70% damage.

nodes.name: Booming Voice
nodes.description: Demoralizing Shout also generates 20 Rage and increases damage you deal to affected targets by 20%.

nodes.name: Shield Specialization
nodes.description: Increases Block chance by 8% and your Block value by 16%.

nodes.name: Shield Charge
nodes.description:
Charge to an enemy with your shield, granting you Shield Block and dealing 84000 Physical damage to it and 26840 Physical damage to all enemies within 10 yards.

Also stuns the primary target for 4 seconds.

Generates 20 Rage.

choices.name: Defender's Aegis
choices.description: Shield Wall gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 60 seconds.

choices.name: Impenetrable Wall
choices.description: Shield Slam reduces the remaining cooldown of Shield Wall by 6 second.

nodes.name: Fueled by Violence
nodes.description: You are healed for 85% of the Bleed damage dealt by Rend and Deep Wounds.

nodes.name: Tough as Nails
nodes.description:
Blocking an attack deals 12000 Physical damage to the attacker. Critical blocks deal double damage.

Generates high threat.

choices.name: Whirling Blade
choices.description: Your attacks have a chance to target a nearby enemy with Ravager for 4 seconds.

choices.name: Ravager
choices.description:
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting 71710 Physical damage to all enemies over 12 seconds. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Revenge and Thunder Clap deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active.

Generates 10 Rage each time it deals damage.

nodes.name: Avatar
nodes.description: Transform into a colossus, increasing all damage you deal by 20% and reducing all damage you take by 3% for 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Indomitable
nodes.description: Your maximum health is increased by 10% and every 15 Rage you spend heals you for 1% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Battle-Scarred Veteran
nodes.description:
When your health is brought below 30%, you take 80% less damage for 8 seconds and healing you receive is increased by 100%.

Cannot occur more than once every 3 minutes.

nodes.name: Punish
nodes.description: Shield Slam deals 15% increased damage and reduces enemies' damage against you by 3% for 9 seconds. Multiple punishments may overlap.

nodes.name: Unyielding Stance
nodes.description: Defensive Stance reduces damage taken by an additional 4%.

choices.name: Spellbreaker
choices.description: You have a 8% chance to disrupt magic damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 50%.

choices.name: Hunker Down
choices.description: Damage you take from area of effect attacks is reduced by 2%. Spell Reflection reduces magic damage taken by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Brutal Vitality
nodes.description:
8% of damage you deal adds to your active Ignore Pain or the next Ignore Pain you activate.

Your next Ignore Pain can be increased by up to 90000.

nodes.name: Massacre
nodes.description: Execute is usable on targets below 35% health.

nodes.name: Last Stand
nodes.description: Activating Shield Wall increases your maximum health by 30% for 8 seconds and instantly heals you for that amount.

nodes.name: Enduring Alacrity
nodes.description: Increases Stamina by 5% and your Haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Focused Vigor
nodes.description: Increases Strength by 3% and your critical strike chance by 1%.

nodes.name: Disrupting Shout
nodes.description: Taunts all enemies within 14 yds to attack you for 6 seconds, interrupts all spellcasting within 14 yds and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 6 seconds. Increases the threat you generate against the target by 800%.

ranks.description: Thunder Clap causes your next Shield Slam to deal 10% additional damage and unleash a wave of force, dealing 19800 Physical damage to all enemies in front of you.
Damage dealt by Thunder Clap and Phalanx's wave of force is increased by 10%.

While Shield Block is active, Shield Slam deals 10% additional damage and has a 20% increased chance to critically strike.

Enemies damaged by Phalanx's wave of force deal 5% reduced damage to you for 8 seconds.

choices.name: Boneshaker
choices.description: Shockwave's stun duration is increased by 1 second and reduces the movement speed of affected enemies by 40% for 3 seconds after the stun ends.

choices.name: Earthquaker
choices.description: Shockwave also knocks enemies into the air and its cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Dominance of the Colossus
nodes.description:
Colossal Might stacks up to 10 times. If you would gain a stack of Colossal Might and are at max stacks, the cooldown of Demolish is reduced by 5 seconds.

Enemies affected by Demolish take up to 10% more damage from you and deal up to 10% less damage to you for 10 seconds based on the number of stacks of Colossal Might consumed by Demolish.

nodes.name: Precise Might
nodes.description: Shield Slam critical strikes grant an additional stack of Colossal Might.

nodes.name: Practiced Strikes
nodes.description:
Shield Slam damage increased by 15%.

Revenge and Thunder Clap damage increased by 15%.

Shield Slam generates an additional 3 Rage.

choices.name: One Against Many
choices.description: Shockwave and Revenge deal 5% more damage per target affected up to 5.

choices.name: Arterial Bleed
choices.description: Colossal Might increases the damage of your Rend and Deep Wounds by 3% per stack.

nodes.name: Mountain of Muscle and Scars
nodes.description:
You deal 5% more damage and take 5% less damage.

Size increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Tide of Battle
nodes.description: Colossal Might increases the damage of your Revenge by 3% per stack.

nodes.name: Martial Expert
nodes.description: Critical strike damage of your abilities is increased by 10% and the amount of damage blocked by your critical blocks is increased by 20%.

choices.name: No Stranger to Pain
choices.description: Damage prevented by each use of Ignore Pain is increased by 20%.

choices.name: Veteran Vitality
choices.description:
When your health is brought below 35%, you gain a Second Wind, healing you for 12% of your max health over 2 seconds.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 60 sec.

nodes.name: Demolish
nodes.description:
Unleash a series of precise and powerful strikes against your target, dealing 229527 damage to it, and 123236 damage to enemies within 10 of it. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

While channeling Demolish, you take 10% less damage and are immune to stuns, knockbacks, and forced movement effects.

You can block, parry, dodge, and use certain defensive abilities while channeling Demolish.

nodes.name: Colossal Might
nodes.description:
Colossal Might increases damage dealt by your next Demolish by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

Shield Slam grants a stack of Colossal Might and Revenge grants a stack of Colossal Might when it strikes 3 or more targets.

nodes.name: Celeritous Conclusion
nodes.description: Demolish's final strike grants 10% Haste for 10 seconds and increases the critical strike chance of your next Shield Slam by 100%.

nodes.name: Cut to the Bone
nodes.description: Shield Slam critical strikes increase your Rend and Deep Wounds damage by 15% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Decimator
nodes.description: Demolish's final strike applies Deep Wounds to all targets at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Thunder Blast
nodes.description:
Shield Slam and Bloodthirst have a 35% chance to grant you Thunder Blast, stacking up to 2 charges.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals 15213 Stormstrike damage and generates 2 Rage.

choices.name: Gathering Clouds
choices.description: Your attacks trigger Lightning Strikes 30% more often.

choices.name: Thorim's Might
choices.description:
Lightning Strikes generate 3 Rage.

Revenge and Execute damage increased by 25%.

choices.name: Flashing Skies
choices.description: Thunder Blast calls down a Lightning Strike on an enemy it hits.

choices.name: Snap Induction
choices.description: Activating Demoralizing Shout grants a charge of Thunder Blast.

choices.name: Keep Your Feet on the Ground
choices.description:
Physical damage taken reduced by 2%.

Thunder Blast reduces damage you take by 8% for 5 seconds.

choices.name: Steadfast as the Peaks
choices.description:
Stamina increased by 5%.

Victory Rush increases your maximum health by 10% for 5 seconds. When this health increase expires, you heal for any amount of the original Victory Rush that healed you in excess of your full health.

nodes.name: Ground Current
nodes.description: Lightning Strikes also deal 2980 Nature damage to enemies near their target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Lightning Strikes
nodes.description:
Damaging enemies with Thunder Clap, Revenge, or Execute has a 25% chance to also strike one with a lightning bolt, dealing 15510 Nature damage.

Lightning Strikes occur 30% more often during Avatar.

nodes.name: Avatar of the Storm
nodes.description:
Casting Avatar grants you 2 charges of Thunder Blast and resets the cooldown of Thunder Clap.

While Avatar is not active, Lightning Strikes have a 10% chance to grant you Avatar for 4 secs.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals Stormstrike damage.

nodes.name: Burst of Power
nodes.description: Lightning Strikes have a 15% chance to make your next 2 Shield Slams have no cooldown.

nodes.name: Strength of the Mountain
nodes.description:
Shield Slam damage increased by 15%.

Demoralizing Shout reduces damage enemies deal to you by an additional 5%.

nodes.name: Crashing Thunder
nodes.description:
Stormstrike or Nature damage your abilities deal is increased by 5%. Stormstrike damage ignores Armor.

Thunder Clap damage increased by 30%.

choices.name: Storm Bolts
choices.description: Storm Bolt also hits 2 additional nearby targets, stunning them for 2 sec, but its cooldown is increased by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Storm Shield
choices.description: Intervening a target grants them a shield for 5 seconds that absorbs magic damage equal to 3 times your Armor.

nodes.name: Capacitance
nodes.description: During Avatar, Thunder Blast extends Avatar's duration by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Conductivity
nodes.description: Lightning Strike damage increased by 10% and critical strike damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Storm Surge
nodes.description: Avatar increases the damage of Thunder Clap by 50% and reduces its cooldown by 200%.
